import React from 'react'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, LineChart, Line, RadialBarChart, RadialBar, Legend } from 'recharts'; import { Flame, Timer, TrendingUp, Trophy, Target } from 'lucide-react'; const Dashboard = ({ user }) => { const weeklyData = [ { day: 'Mon', duration: 45, calories: 320, workouts: 1 }, { day: 'Tue', duration: 60, calories: 450, workouts: 1 }, { day: 'Wed', duration: 0, calories: 0, workouts: 0 }, { day: 'Thu', duration: 75, calories: 520, workouts: 1 }, { day: 'Fri', duration: 50, calories: 380, workouts: 1 }, { day: 'Sat', duration: 90, calories: 650, workouts: 1 }, { day: 'Sun', duration: 0, calories: 0, workouts: 0 }, ]; const recentWorkouts = [ { id: 1, title: 'Upper Body Strength', type: 'strength', duration: 55, calories: 320, date: '2024-01-20' }, { id: 2, title: 'Morning Run', type: 'cardio', duration: 30, calories: 280, date: '2024-01-19' }, { id: 3, title: 'HIIT Session', type: 'hiit', duration: 45, calories: 450, date: '2024-01-18' }, { id: 4, title: 'Yoga Flow', type: 'yoga', duration: 60, calories: 180, date: '2024-01-17' }, ]; const goalProgress = (user.totalWorkouts % user.weeklyGoal) / user.weeklyGoal * 100; return (

); }; export default Dashboard;
